Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Savory Royal
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: A royal baked tray, filled with a rich selection of savory dishes including croissant sandwiches, rolled sandwiches, small tarts, canapés with smoked salmon, colorful skewers and fresh cherry tomatoes, elegantly served on a wooden tray for special occasions

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Spring Salad
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: A collection of fresh and healthy salads, combining quality legumes with colorful seasonal vegetables and rich flavors, served with special sauces served in unique bowls with natural touches, perfect for serving at an event

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Boutique Cookies
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: Perfect homemade cookies, with subtle touches of crunch that add a unique and luxurious flavor. Each cookie is skillfully baked, combining perfect crunch and rich flavor

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Imperial Pizza
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: A luxurious pizza tray, featuring a refined selection of signature pizzas with rich sauces and premium toppings, is offered on a serving board for special celebrations

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Monte Carlo Tartlets
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: A luxurious savory hospitality tray, filled with small and rich tartlets with varied fillings of vegetables, cheese and salmon, served under an elegant glass dome for special occasions

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Savory Nobility
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: Savory Hospitality Tray Luxurious with fresh and rich pastries, including crispy croissants, spinach rolls and mini pizzas, served luxuriously on a wooden tray for special occasions

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Sweet Potato Crunch
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: A perfect treat of crispy dough rolls containing richly flavored baked sweet potato sticks, served on a wooden tray with touches of fresh rosemary. Accompanied by a selection of fine sauces to choose from, suitable for serving at social events or light meals

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Delicacies Canapes
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: A small and delicious selection of fine canapes, made with a crispy base and varied flavors including fresh vegetables, and creamy cheeses, served with touches of rosemary and delicate decorations. Perfect for elegant hospitality or social gatherings

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Trace Focaccia
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: A selection of fresh and delicious focaccia, made from airy dough and varied flavors that include fresh vegetables, fine toppings and delicate spices. Served with complementary sauces and natural decorations, suitable for a light meal or home hospitality

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Cheese Brioche Bites
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: Small and juicy rolls made from soft brioche dough, filled with fresh vegetables, yellow cheese and fine toppings. Served on a wooden tray with complementary sauces and herb decorations, suitable for light hospitality or a quick and luxurious meal

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Nouveau Carrot
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: A fresh and delicious carrot drink, served in elegant glasses with carrot toppings and fresh vegetables, accompanied by skewers for convenient serving. Perfect as a light and healthy experience at family and social events

Savory Hospitality Trays.name: Szechuan Pastry
Savory Hospitality Trays.description: Small, crispy pies filled with a colorful vegetable filling and intense Sichuan-style flavors, served with complementary sauces and garnishes of fresh infusions. Perfect as a unique snack for events or a light meal

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Sweet Palace
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: A luxurious hospitality tray that combines various desserts - layers of rich chocolate, delicate strawberry cream, and refreshing passion fruit on a crispy base, decorated with gold and chocolate decorations, for varied flavors and a perfect culinary experience

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Praline Garden
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: Enjoy a culinary journey with rich round pralines and chocolate on a stick in vibrant colors, combining flavors of chocolate cream, fruit and caramel, every bite is a tempting and luxurious celebration for special occasions

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Macaroon Festival
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: A feast for the senses with colorful and magical macaroons, combining flavors such as creamy vanilla, soft pistachio and juicy raspberries, every bite is a spectacular gourmet journey that tempts the palate

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Sweet Symphony
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: A collection of elegantly cut cakes, including cheesecakes with strawberries, chocolate marzipan, Crumble with jam and powdered lemon cubes, served in perfect harmony for luxurious events

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Chocolate Suite
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: A wealth of crispy tartlets filled with rich chocolate mousse, decorated with meticulous cream and touches of gold, elegantly served with a pink bow for luxurious events

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Mini Tricolo Premium
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: A festive hospitality tray that includes a selection of personal desserts in vanilla, chocolate, berries and toffee flavors - served in elegant shot glasses with handmade decorations. Perfect for events, conferences and special treats

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Mini Donuts
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: A colorful collection of donuts, combining deep chocolate, pink toppings with delicate confectionery touches, served in elegant harmony for prestigious events

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Exotic Puff
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: Go on a journey of flavors with soft, creamy puffs, wrapped in a shiny coating in spectacular pastel colors, filled with surprising chocolate and cream fillings, served with a regal touch that will delight every palate at prestigious events

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Summer Malabi
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: Indulge in the perfect creamy pleasure of luxurious Malabi, blended with Bold fruity sauces and surprising decorations of pistachios and crunchy caramel, served in a royal setting that will elevate any event to the peak of taste and splendor

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Blintz Serenade
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: Enjoy a feast of soft and perfect blintzes, wrapped in a creamy cream filling and melted chocolate coating, decorated with crunchy nut textures, served in an elegant beauty that will elevate any luxurious event to the level of pleasure

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Truffles
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: Enjoy the deep indulgence of round chocolate truffles, combining rich cocoa flavors, silky vanilla cream and melting caramel, decorated with surprising textures, served with elegance that will charm any prestigious event

Sweet Hospitality Trays.name: Mini Lemonade
Sweet Hospitality Trays.description: Enjoy a refreshing experience of creamy lemonades, wrapped in golden and crispy meringue foam, combining the sour and sweet taste of fresh lemon, served in elegant beauty that will fill any luxurious event with a summery scent

Special Events.name: Sweet package for a new mother (daughter)
Special Events.description: Fine chocolates that melt in your mouth, crispy handmade cookies, cupcakes decorated in delicate colors, and colorful candies that delight the heart. Each item is carefully selected to give the new mother sweet moments of happiness

Special Events.name: Sweet Box for the Mother-to-Be (B)
Special Events.description: Fine chocolates that melt in your mouth, crispy handmade cookies, cupcakes designed in delicate colors, and colorful candies that delight the heart. Each item is carefully selected to give the mother-to-be sweet moments of happiness

Special Events.name: Sweet Birthday Box
Special Events.description: Cookies decorated with words, macarons in gorgeous flavors, heart-shaped chocolates coated in gold and pink, and candies with colorful sugar decorations. In addition, a decorated bottle of pink wine adds an elegant touch. Everything is packaged in an elegant box

Special Events.name: Sweet gift box for an employee
Special Events.description: A luxurious dessert box that upgrades every moment - an elegant box with a gold ribbon tied in a bow reveals a world of juicy flavors: tarts with fresh and creamy strawberries, small cakes decorated with edible gold, and light whipped cream that pampers the palate

Special Events.name: Sweet gift box for a halaka
Special Events.description: A luxurious dessert box that opens the celebration - a deep blue box with a ribbon tied in a bow reveals a world of Flavors: Cream balls decorated with gold and sugar stones, a small cake with an elegant blue coating, and a metallic whipped cream cube that pampers the palate

Special Events.name: Wedding Sweet Box
Special Events.description: A luxurious dessert box that gives a touch of magic to the wedding day! An elegant box filled with fine flavors: creamy cupcakes decorated with gold, small round cakes with edible gold touches, and airy whipped cream cubes

Special Events.name: Sweet Anniversary Box
Special Events.description: A luxurious white-flavored chocolate box, decorated with gold-plated strawberries, pink hearts and cream flowers, served with a gold ribbon for special events

Special Events.name: Sweet Box for Complete Healing
Special Events.description: A refreshing dessert box that delights the heart in a colorful medical design, full of indulgent flavors: richly filled chocolates, colorful cookies, blue cream balls, and medicine-looking candies. Includes a blue candy jar

Special Events.name: Sweet Box for Bar Mitzvah
Special Events.description: A royal gold box designed in rich gold tones, conveys luxury and sophistication with elegant touches. Inside await high-quality handmade chocolate pralines, truffles Fine, golden macaroons and rare gourmet sweets. Every detail is carefully packaged

Special Events.name: Bat Mitzvah Sweet Box
Special Events.description: A luxurious rose gold Bat Mitzvah box, combining elegance and rich flavors. Includes golden chocolates, delicate macaroons, cupcakes decorated with gold decorations, and gourmet sweets packaged in an elegant box with silk ribbons. A personalized balloon adds a royal touch

Special Events.name: Sweet Thank You Gift Box for the Team
Special Events.description: Perfect thank you gift box for a kindergarten teacher, teacher or anyone who deserves it! An elegant blue box with a red ribbon wraps a selection of fine chocolates and a cookie printed with thank you

Special Events.name: Luxurious Tractate Completion Package
Special Events.description: A luxurious Tractate Completion Celebration Package, combining tradition and sweetness! Includes chocolates shaped like Torah scrolls, rustling cookies with gold Tractate Completion inscription, and white chocolate bars with detailed scripture. Packaged in a black box lined with a straw, this package brings the spirit of celebration with perfect flavors

Showcase Cakes.name: Pistachio Magic
Showcase Cakes.description: A luxurious layer cake combining deep chocolate mousse, velvety pistachio cream and a crispy crust, decorated with fresh fruit, golden macarons and touches of real gold. A spectacular culinary creation for every sophisticated palate

Showcase Cakes.name: Golden Lily
Showcase Cakes.description: Fine ice cream cake with velvety cream mousse, crispy golden marzipan crust, and juicy red fruits, Decorated with touches of real gold. A culinary masterpiece served on a gold platter for a rich and luxurious taste

Showcase Cakes.name: Chocolate Opera
Showcase Cakes.description: A rich chocolate cake with layers of velvety mousse, decorated with a perfect orange flower, shiny gold grains and meticulous chocolate decorations, combining deep and luxurious flavors for an unforgettable taste

Showcase Cakes.name: Strawberry Luxor
Showcase Cakes.description: A luxurious chocolate cake, wrapped in a velvety glow, enhanced with fresh berries and delicate whipped cream, served luxuriously on a gold platter

Showcase Cakes.name: Serena Strawberry
Showcase Cakes.description: A luxurious and rich cake, decorated with juicy fresh strawberries and delicate whipped cream, served in spectacular beauty on a white tray with delicate gold touches, designed for extraordinary events

Showcase Cakes.name: Dolce Royale
Showcase Cakes.description: A shiny milk jam cake, coated with rich caramel, decorated with fresh strawberries and delicate whipped cream, served luxuriously on an elegant tray. For luxurious and exciting events

Showcase Cakes.name: Goldenika
Showcase Cakes.description: Elegant, modern cream cake, decorated with shiny gold and luxurious ball decorations, served in spectacular beauty for special celebrations

Showcase Cakes.name: Passion Fruit Deluxe
Showcase Cakes.description: An elegant passion fruit pie, filled with a creamy cream and topped with fresh passion fruit, decorated with delicate whipped cream and touches of gold, served luxuriously on a spectacular platter

Showcase Cakes.name: Blueberry Sapphire
Showcase Cakes.description: A creamy and rich cheesecake, topped with a glossy blueberry cream and fresh blueberries, served luxuriously on a golden platter With subtle touches of caramel

Showcase Cakes.name: Raspberry Peak
Showcase Cakes.description: A spectacular cake with a shiny red gelatin coating, decorated with fresh black raspberries and golden nuts, served luxuriously on a white tray with delicate chocolate and white flowers

Showcase Cakes.name: Coconut de Chocolate
Showcase Cakes.description: A luxurious chocolate cake, decorated with a rich filling of chocolate balls and gold, with touches of artistic ice creams, served luxuriously on a golden stand with a flowing Velvety Chocolate

Showcase Cakes.name: Gift Cake
Showcase Cakes.description: A royal gift cake with delicate cream and rich chocolate icing, decorated with a spectacular gold bow, served luxuriously on a golden tray alongside touches of flowers and wine. Suitable for festive occasions such as birthdays and weddings

Desserts.name: Elegant Red
Desserts.description: A meticulous dessert of shiny raspberry crust, combined with a delicate peanut butter cream layer, decorated with a caramel flower, fresh raspberries and gold finishes, for an especially sweet and luxurious taste

Desserts.name: Elegant Red
Desserts.description: A meticulous dessert of shiny raspberry wrapper, combined with a delicate peanut butter cream layer, decorated with a caramel flower, fresh raspberries and gold finishes, for an especially sweet and luxurious taste

Desserts.name: Chocolate Globe
Desserts.description: An elegant dessert of shiny dark chocolate wrapper, accompanied by juicy strawberries and soft vanilla ice cream, placed on a crispy crunch layer, with touches of gold that add a touch of luxury to the palate

Desserts.name: Ruby Elegant
Desserts.description: A velvety mousse ball in deep ruby color, combined with a delicate red fruit cream, decorated with a chocolate ring, gold leaf and meticulous decorations. A luxurious culinary creation for a sophisticated taste

Desserts.name: Almond Layers
Desserts.description: An impressive dessert of layers of velvety chocolate, light vanilla cream and juicy raspberry sauce, placed on a crispy crunch base, decorated with roasted almonds and gold finishes for a deep and luxurious taste

Desserts.name: Chocolate Sphere
Desserts.description: A perfect dessert of layers of warm chocolate and light vanilla cream, placed on a delicate crunch base, Decorated with chocolate balls and cocoa flakes with touches of gold, for a rich taste and meticulous texture

Desserts.name: Carmel Flower
Desserts.description: A spectacular dessert of a shiny red chocolate ball, placed on a crispy crunch base, decorated with a red sugar flower and touches of gold, combining deep flavors and a perfect texture

Desserts.name: Bloom Rose
Desserts.description: A delicate dessert of shiny rose cream coating on a crispy base, decorated with a luxurious sugar flower with touches of gold, offering a sophisticated taste and perfect texture

Desserts.name: Red Gift
Desserts.description: A luxurious dessert of shiny red chocolate coating, decorated withA rainbow of sparkling gold and delicate pearl, combining rich flavors and a velvety texture for a luxurious culinary experience

Desserts.name: Royal Rose
Desserts.description: An elegant dessert made of a delicate pinkish cream layer, surrounded by a velvety texture of white chocolate mousse, decorated with a perfect pink flower and elegant gold pearls. A luxurious culinary experience served on a gold platter, perfect for prestigious events

Desserts.name: Red Rasco
Desserts.description: An elegant dessert of shiny red chocolate coating, combined with creamy vanilla ice cream and fresh berries. Served with a delicate lemon sauce and artistic decoration, for a luxurious and luxurious taste

Desserts.name: Creamy Volota
Desserts.description: A multi-layered pastry of chocolate and vanilla cream, placed on a crunch base, decorated with shiny caramel and chocolate decorations, for a deep flavor and a fine gastronomic experience.

Desserts.name: Alfajores Deluxe
Desserts.description: Luxury cookies of two layers of delicate biscuits, filled with creamy and rich milk jam, coated with coconut whipped cream for a sweet taste and perfect texture

Desserts.name: Tropical Dream
Desserts.description: A refreshing mango passion layer, topped with smooth and indulgent vanilla cream, with the addition of fresh berries, strawberries, kiwi and mint leaves - a refreshing, natural, and unforgettable dessert

Desserts.name: Black Oreo
Desserts.description: A meticulous dessert of rich dark chocolate layers, light whipped cream and Oreo cookie crunch, decorated with delicate gold finishes for deep flavor, perfect texture and unforgettable luxury

Desserts.name: Passion Fortress
Desserts.description: A creamy and perfect personal cheesecake, served with passion fruit sauce Sour and juicy, decorated with delicate gold finishes for a tropical and luxurious taste

Desserts.name: Party Chocolate
Desserts.description: Rich dark chocolate mousse with a touch of premium whiskey, smooth ganache whipped cream, Belgian chocolate chips, caramelized praline, and an artisanal chocolate cube. An elegant, deep and refined dessert - an experience that is suitable for a luxurious evening

Desserts.name: Grand Caramel Hazelnut
Desserts.description: A luxurious dessert of rich caramel chocolate balls, coated with roasted hazelnut flavor and crispy texture, served with touches of natural hazelnuts for a warm and luxurious taste

Desserts.name: Chocolate Delight
Desserts.description: A rich chocolate dessert with a velvety texture, decorated with delicate chocolate curls, fresh strawberries and a touch of gold, served in an elegant glass for a luxurious and indulgent taste

Desserts.name: Mango Paradise
Desserts.description: A refreshing mango dessert with a smooth and creamy texture, topped with a layer of passion fruit sauce, fresh mint leaves and delicate gold flakes, served in an elegant glass for a tropical and luxurious taste

Desserts.name: King of Kiwi
Desserts.description: A meticulous dessert of juicy green kiwi ice cream, wrapped in a smooth dark chocolate layer, served with natural touches for an elegant look and a pampering tropical taste

Desserts.name: Coffee Panna Cotta
Desserts.description: A velvety dessert of rich coffee cream, embedded in a layer of dark chocolate, served with sweet cream and roasted coffee beans, for a warm and indulgent taste in an elegant style
